skip if recent results exist

read summary.yaml
all pass → exit early

LLM agents (Explore)
read skill's SKILL.md
read failing transcripts
examine failing outputs
form hypotheses

Edit SKILL.md
surgical, targeted fixes
ground in judge evidence
explain why, not just rules
avoid overfitting to one case
respect execution mode

--baseline previous iter
check targeted fixes passed
detect regressions
compare aggregate scores

Handle Regressions
assess severity
minor → continue
major → revert + retry
stuck → report to user

div.div:
Rules
─────────────────
• never broad generic changes
• check regressions after edit
• stop after max iterations
• don't modify test cases
• don't modify eval.yaml
• try different approaches
